name: CH4 Natural Solutions Corp
business: CH4 Natural Solutions Acquisition Corp. (MTNE) is a blank check company formed to effect a merger with one or more businesses. It has not identified any potential business combination target and has no current operations. The company intends to focus on acquiring a business with a significant real-asset footprint that can benefit from accelerated methane mitigation initiatives.

exposures.sentence: Our management team and our board of directors have extensive experience in identifying and executing acquisitions across the agriculture, renewable, infrastructure, upstream and industrial services sectors, and have a substantial history of managing portfolios of industrial assets that they believe must be at the core of a solutions roadmap to address sustainability.
We expect that target opportunities may operate across the agriculture and traditional energy sectors.
We expect that target opportunities may operate across the agriculture and traditional energy sectors.

We intend to capitalize on the sponsor's platforms to identify, acquire and build a company with a significant real-asset footprint that may provide opportunities for attractive risk-adjusted returns and benefit from accelerated methane mitigation initiatives at scale.
